stemHtml: To improve the detection of precipitation area(s) in e.g. thunderstorms, in which the top of the cloud lies at or slightly above the level of flight, the tilt setting should be..

options.a: higher when the aircraft climbs to a higher altitude.
options.b: lower when the aircraft climbs to a higher altitude.
options.c: lower when the selected range increases.
options.d: higher when the selected range decreases.
